build.beforeBuildCommand: wasm-pack build crates/cube_wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../web/pkg --out-name cube_wasm || wasm-pack build ../crates/cube_wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../web/pkg --out-name cube_wasm

bundle.longDescription: Generate scrambled N×N cubes and watch real Rust solvers (meet-in-the-middle, beam, island genetic) find verified solutions — plus a wall of evolutionary trials.
